phoneNumberId.title: Phone Number ID
phoneNumberId.placeholder: Enter your WhatsApp Business Phone Number ID
phoneNumberId.description: Get your Phone Number ID from the Meta Developer Portal under your WhatsApp Business app.

accessToken.title: Access token
accessToken.placeholder: Enter your Meta Cloud API access token
accessToken.description: Permanent access token from the Meta Developer Portal for the WhatsApp Business API.

webhookVerifyToken.title: Webhook verify token
webhookVerifyToken.description: A custom token used to verify the webhook URL during WhatsApp webhook registration.

appSecret.title: App secret
appSecret.description: App Secret from the Meta Developer Portal, used to verify webhook payload signatures (X-Hub-Signature-256). Leave empty to skip signature verification.

allowedPhoneNumbers.title: Allowed phone numbers
allowedPhoneNumbers.description: Comma-separated phone numbers allowed to interact with the bot (with or without '+' prefix). Leave empty to allow all numbers.

config.edited: WhatsApp bot settings have been updated
config.notEdited: Failed to update WhatsApp bot settings

texts.aboutWhatsappSettings: Configure your WhatsApp Business API integration. You need a Meta Business account with a verified phone number. Set the webhook URL to your server's /api/v1/plugins/buddy-whatsapp/webhook endpoint.
